case_title: FERMER, MARTY vs. CRANE, STEPHEN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FERMER, MARTY AS TO DEFENDANT CRANE, STEPHEN CRANE, SEAN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CRANE, STEPHEN

CAUSE CALLED BY COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/S.A. MACDONALD AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 143-A DUBOCE ST. (DOWNSTAIRS APT), S.F, CA. - ALL RENT & DAMAGES WVD. - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & FEES - EVICTION STAYED TO 6-4-94, MIDNIGHT - NO FURTHER STAYS - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - SEC. DEP. RETAINED BY PL. & NO ACCOUNTING REQUIRED- POSSESSIONS LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED - DEF. TO GIVE SET OF KEYS TO PL. TODAY - IRMA LEE MISA (TENANT IN BLDG) TO HAVE POSSESSION OF STOVE BOUGHT BY DEF. - IF DEF. VACATES BY 6-4-94, PL. BY EXPARTE MOT. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM. PL. ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT CRANE, STEPHEN

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FERMER, MARTY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-26-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-01-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT CRANE, STEPHEN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRANE, SEAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 143-A DUBOCE STREET, DOWNSAIRS APARTMENT, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES ALL RENTS & DAMAGES, EACH SIDE BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS, NO FURTHER STAYS, MUTUAL RELEASE, RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT, REMAINING PROPERTY DEEMED ABANDONED,SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS
